purpose: Script additions for Phase 6 (E2E with Maestro). Merge these into root package.json after Phase 1-1 (Jest 30 upgrade) completes to avoid merge conflicts.
context: See .current_work/test-framework-overhaul/6-6-IOSMacOSRunner.md step 1 for the build:ios:simulator script rationale.

scripts.build:ios:simulator: cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace HarmonyAIChat.xcworkspace -scheme HarmonyAIChat -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath build -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' && cd build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator && zip -r HarmonyAIChat.app.zip HarmonyAIChat.app
scripts.e2e:android:up: docker compose -f e2e/docker-compose.yml up -d harmony-link android-emulator

notes: build:ios:simulator: Builds a Debug configuration .app for the iOS Simulator and zips it.
build:e2e:android: Builds the Android APK with the e2e/.env.e2e env file (WSS URL for emulator).
build:e2e:ios: Builds the iOS Simulator .app with the e2e/.env.e2e.ios env file.
e2e:android: Starts the full Docker Compose stack and runs Maestro flows.
e2e:android:up: Starts harmony-link + android-emulator services in background.
e2e:android:run: Runs only the maestro-runner service (useful after stack is already up).
